privileged_info_summary: The task uses real HTTPS connections to actual public services (Google, Example.com, Wikipedia, Cloudflare, and GitHub API) captured dynamically at runtime using tcpdump on port 443. The capture file is stored at /home/ga/Documents/captures/tls_traffic.pcap, the expected report at /home/ga/Documents/tls_audit_report.txt, and ground truth metrics are computed and stored in /var/lib/wireshark_ground_truth/ using tshark (version 3.4.10). If the initial capture is insufficient, the system falls back to a pre-installed http.cap file. The verifier checks the generated report against ground truth values with a scoring rubric (60/100 points required to pass).
